steps.title: Translate the model to an equation
steps.content: The statement “head width equals 0.6 added to four times body weight” becomes: $$h = 0.6 + 4w$$ where $h$ is head width in mm and $w$ is body weight in grams.

steps.title: Substitute the body weight and compute
steps.content: With $w = 0.5$ grams, substitute directly: $$h = 0.6 + 4(0.5) = 0.6 + 2 = 2.6$$ The head width is 2.6 millimeters.
